speaker: speaker1
text: You're not looking happy . What's the matter ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , nothing special . I'm just a bit tired .

speaker: speaker2
text: With everything , with everybody , with all this !

speaker: speaker1
text: A good suggestion for you . You need a holiday .

speaker: speaker2
text: It wasn't always like this , you know .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , I mean . We always do the same thing . There's no variety in our lives .

speaker: speaker1
text: You need a holiday . That's what's the matter .
